member.name: T:Origam.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.ArrayCannotBeConverted
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Array cannot be converted to string..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.CannotParseAssemblyAndClass
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot parse Assembly and Class name from "type" attribute in "{0}" node.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.CannotReadType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot read "type" attribute from "{0}" node.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.CantSaveConfig
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot save configuration..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.CantSaveConfigDuplicateName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot save configuration. Configuration names must be unique..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.ErrorsDuringPartialRollback
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Errors occured while partially rolling back transaction.{0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.ErrorsDuringRollback
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Errors occured while rolling back transaction.{0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.ExceptionSavingTransaction
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Exception occured while saving transaction..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.InvalidProperty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid property or field name.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.OrigamSettingsExceptionPrefix
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot read OrigamSettings.config... .

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.PartialRollbackNotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Partial rollback of transaction is not supported by {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.PathNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find path "{0}".

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.SavingNotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Saving of transaction is not supported by {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.SessionStoreDisposed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Session store has already been disposed.

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.ShortGnu
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Copyright (C) 2022 Advantage Solutions, s.r.o This program comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY. This is free software, and you are welcome to redistribute it under certain conditions..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.TransactionRegistered
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Transaction is already registered..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.UnsuportedType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unsupported member type..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.UrlPartParameterNull
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Url part is to be replaced by a parameter value but the value provided is NULL. Cannot construct URL..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.UserNotLoggedInException
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User not logged in..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.XmlNoRoot
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempting to merge an XML document that has a root element with attributes. Root element should have no attributes. This is probably a result of an XSLT transformation that does not produce a proper root element..

member.name: P:Origam.Strings.XPathIsNull
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Property XPath of object: {0} is null, references could not be indexed..

member.name: M:Origam.XmlTools.GetXmlSlice(System.Xml.XPath.XPathNodeIterator)
member.summary: Returns current iterator's node with all its child nodes and also parent nodes, excluding any other parent's children.
